hero.title: Ta퍔a퍔 in 콂a퍔ck톝
hero.lead: IATF l칛t k톝 naath k톝 du톖퍔톖퍔p mi퍔 /ka퍔n met 콂a퍔c 톝 n톝y tin k톖퍔콂. P칛칛r pr칬jekni퍔, ko퍔o퍔tni퍔 tin ca g톝r, ta퍔a퍔 bo퍔th칛 콂톖aani퍔, k톝n톝 yio퍔w tin la퍔tk톝 l칛t caa k톝 g톖퍔r piny gua퍔thni퍔 tin te naath thi퍔n.

items: Du톖톖li퍔 k톝 kui퍔 la퍔t. L칛t tin caa nh톖k, tin caa t톖퍔w, k톝n톝 tin caa ku칢콂 gua퍔a퍔th mi퍔 d톖퍔콂 caa k톝 g톖퍔r piny 톝 la tin caa ka퍔m raar r톝y gua퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛 kuakni퍔, k칛 caa k톝 mat r톝y war톝gak칛 mi퍔 caa g톖퍔ar piny k톝 kui퍔i퍔 n톝톝ni퍔 ti퍔 콂uan. k톝팯l k톝팯톝팯l쿯콂u mi ca la퍔r ji퍔?
Go퍔o퍔r war톝gakni퍔. Gua퍔th tin laa g칬rk톝 ruaacni퍔 naath thi퍔n laa k톝 laa t톖퍔a퍔wk톝 k칛 IATF GitHub, k칛 website 톝m톝, ki톝 gua퍔thni퍔 ti퍔ti퍔 da퍔콂 r톝w.
K톖dni퍔 r톖퍔 g톝rk톝. 쿯ni퍔 du톖퍔톖퍔r mi퍔 ci퍔 r톖 g톝r k칛 k톖d 톝 mi퍔 caa la퍔th k칛 n톝y diaal r톝y gua퍔th in caa t톖퍔w thi퍔n. Guic IATF Gua퍔a퍔th la퍔t GitHub쿯콂u mi ca la퍔r ji퍔?
Ku칛칛r du톖퍔톖퍔r칛 c톝 r톖 g톝r. L칛t tin pay la퍔t k톝 kui퍔i퍔 guir칛 콂톖aani퍔 laa k톝 laa gu톖퍔톖퍔rk톝 mi퍔 ci퍔k톝 r톖퍔 la퍔th l칛t. IATF-w톝b-sayt gua퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛. la퍔t ni퍔 t칢칢 ci퍔 tu톖톖k k칛 GitHub.

L칛칛tni퍔 tin la퍔tk톝. IATF la퍔thk톝 yio퍔w l칛tni퍔 piny k칛 g톖퍔a퍔rk톝 pek yio퍔o퍔ni퍔 tin laa tu톖톖k톝 k톝 kui퍔i퍔 kuakni퍔 nath. Ni퍔 k톝 ru톖퍔n 2022, k톝n tin di퍔tni퍔k톝n tin laa w톖퍔 k톝 w톖퍔 톝 ci퍔칬tni퍔 d칬칬ri퍔 ti퍔 g칬칬l (domain names).

L칛t ti퍔 caa mat piny. Ruaacni퍔 tin ca la퍔t k톝 kui퍔i퍔 gu칛c 콂톖aani퍔 ki톝 ca퍔a퍔p in d칢칢 ku칢콂 thi퍔n baa k톝 ku칢콂 k칛 GitHub Discussions on the relevant repository view Ruaacni퍔 k톝 gua퍔th IATF-w톝b-sayt gua퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛.

header.title: Kuen톝 k톝 kui퍔i퍔 yio퍔o퍔ni퍔 tin la퍔tk톝

paragraphs: IATF laa nh톖k톝 톢칬칬 bi퍔k톝 l칛tki톝n diaal la퍔t k톝 du톖퍔톖퍔p mi퍔 t톖t.
쿯n wargak 톝m톝 /ci톝 kuic yio퍔o퍔ni퍔 mi퍔 caa guic 톝 n톝y ti퍔 콂uan, 톝 kuic kuakni퍔 tin la퍔tk톝 k톝 kui퍔i퍔 l칛tni퍔 IATF.
operatingCosts.footnote: Ri퍔bi퍔tni퍔 d칢칢 k톝 g톖퍔a퍔r piny ki톝 d칢칢 k톝 ka퍔m raar k톝 k톖r k칛 mi퍔 caa k톝 riali퍔k칛.

items.label: Ruaacni퍔
items.value: Cuu gua퍔a퍔th in la퍔tk톝 thi퍔n la퍔t k톝 yio퍔w ti t톖t 톝 mugiwarafx. K칛 gua퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛 (hosting) laa l칛t k톝 ti퍔 t칛 k톝 lua퍔콂 mi퍔 t톖t (free-tier infrastructure) ki톝 ti퍔 /thi톝l pek ti퍔 콂uan (low-cost infrastructure) k톝 du톖퍔p mi퍔 c톖ali퍔 Cloudflare. iatf.cc wi퍔cmu톖퍔톖퍔n.

paragraphs: Tha퍔a퍔콂 콂톖aani퍔 caa k톝 la퍔th raar r톝y ruaacni퍔 nath k톝 톢칬칬:
items: Ri퍔c nath tin dee naath r칬m k톝 n톝y tin la퍔tk톝 ca퍔a퍔p ti퍔ti퍔.
G톖퍔a퍔r war톝gak칛 k칛r톖a k톝 톢칬칬 ba min g칬rk톝 kul톝 콂a퍔c 톝 g톖aa 톝 콂ot /ka퍔n톝 ni nh톖k, ki톝 lo퍔kd톝, ki톝 ka퍔md톝 raar.
Adr톝thni퍔 nath, n칛mb칛ri퍔 t톝l톝p톖ni퍔, k톝n톝 tin k톖퍔ki톝n tin /ca go퍔r.
쿯ni퍔 du톖퍔톖퍔r mi퍔 ba 콂a퍔c 톝 la ram k톝l mi퍔 l칛t k톝 t톝kn톖l톖ji퍔 mi퍔 lu칛k naath mi퍔 thi톝l톝 mi퍔 nh톖k톝.
Raw Discord ruacni퍔, 톝ni퍔 mi퍔 ca ruac mi퍔 콂a퍔ck톝 na콂 k톝 du톖퍔톖퍔p mi퍔 ba 콂a퍔c 톝 n톝y diaal.

header.title: Ku칛r 톝 j톝n bu톖k 콂u톖퍔tni퍔 min ku r톖톖d톝 g톖퍔a퍔r piny k칛 ruaacni퍔 t톖퍔t톖퍔.

paragraphs: Mi퍔 go퍔o퍔ri퍔 톢칬칬 bi퍔 콂a퍔c i퍔di퍔 톝n pr칬jekni퍔 ba k톝 nh톖k, ba k톝 yi퍔k t톖퍔w, ki톝 ba k톝 ny톖k k톝 l칛th l칛t, ku톝n war톝gak guir칛.
